context: Tests whether the agent uses the recommended audiobook voice settings preset, implements request stitching for multi-part chapters, uses the raw response API for cost tracking via headers, and handles the speed parameter correctly.

checklist.name: Python client import
checklist.description: Imports ElevenLabs from elevenlabs.client (i.e., 'from elevenlabs.client import ElevenLabs')

checklist.name: VoiceSettings import
checklist.description: Imports VoiceSettings from elevenlabs (i.e., 'from elevenlabs import VoiceSettings')

checklist.name: Audiobook stability
checklist.description: Sets stability to a high value (0.6 or above) appropriate for narration, not a low expressive value

checklist.name: Audiobook style
checklist.description: Sets style to 0.0 or a low value (below 0.2) as recommended for narration, not a high dramatic value

checklist.name: Request stitching previous_text
checklist.description: Uses previous_text parameter in convert() calls for continuation chunks within a chapter

checklist.name: Request stitching next_text
checklist.description: Uses next_text parameter in convert() calls for chunks that have a following chunk

checklist.name: Raw response for tracking
checklist.description: Uses client.text_to_speech.convert.with_raw_response() to access response headers for character count tracking

checklist.name: Character count header
checklist.description: Reads the 'x-character-count' header from the response to determine characters used

checklist.name: Speed parameter
checklist.description: Includes a speed parameter in VoiceSettings or convert() call, with a value within the valid range 0.7-1.2

checklist.name: Response parse
checklist.description: Calls response.parse() to extract the audio data from the raw response object

checklist.name: Valid model ID
checklist.description: Uses a valid ElevenLabs model ID (one of: eleven_v3, eleven_multilingual_v2, eleven_flash_v2_5, eleven_flash_v2, eleven_turbo_v2_5)

checklist.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY
checklist.description: References ELEVENLABS_API_KEY as the environment variable for API key configuration
